name: Italian Salad Dressing Mix
recipeIngredient: 3/8 cup dry grated Parmesan (or Romano) cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients and store in an air-tight container. The mix will keep for several months.
2. To make salad dressing, combine 1 tablespoon of the mix with 1/4 cup vinegar, 2 tablespoons water, and 2/3 cup oil (or a combination of oils totaling this amount) in a covered container. Shake vigorously.
3. For a dip, mix 1 tablespoon of the mix with 1/4 cup mayonnaise and 1 tablespoon water in a covered container. Shake vigorously.
4. Alternatively, mix 1 tablespoon of the mix with 1/4 cup of your preferred spread (mayonnaise, yogurt, or sour cream). You can also add Dijon mustard and other herbs to taste. Serve with raw vegetables.
